title: Marie Galante
writer: Reginald Berkeley, Jacques Deval, William Absalom Drake
actors: Spencer Tracy, Ketti Gallian, Ned Sparks
plot: Marie is kidnapped and taken aboard ship, then thrown off at Yucatan. She winds up singing in a café in the Panama Canal zone. There she gets involved in a plot to destroy the canal and runs into American intelligence officer Craw...
